- Update to 20140707
- Take maintainership

I was the maintainer of this port and I am the rules maintainer. I dont know why this port
was taken over. I noticed it today, as I wanted to add STAGEDIR support.

Port maintainer (adamw@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
